volumes.title: Vol. I: Iron Dawn (1978–1981)
volumes.description: The Di'Anno years. Punk-metal from the streets of East London.

volumes.title: Vol. II: Ascension (1982–1985)
volumes.description: The Number of the Beast through Powerslave. The golden age.

volumes.title: Vol. III: Somewhere in Time (1986–1989)
volumes.description: Synth guitars, the concept album, and the peak of ambition.

volumes.title: Vol. IV: The Darkening (1990–1999)
volumes.description: Bruce departs, Blaze arrives. The difficult years and the hidden masterworks.

volumes.title: Vol. V: Renaissance (2000–2006)
volumes.description: The reunion. Three guitars. The progressive rebirth.

volumes.title: Vol. VI: The Endless Frontier (2010–2021)
volumes.description: Double albums, 18-minute epics, and the refusal to stop.

volumes.title: Live Appendix: Up the Irons
volumes.description: Live After Death, Rock in Rio, and the sound of 250,000 people losing their minds.
